title: [SV] Update SVExtractTestCode to handle already bound instances.
body:
We already skip over extracting from already bound instances to prevent binds under binds. And we already do not inline or extract instances that have an inner ref. But sometimes we extract test code from a module that contains a bound instance sibling to the newly bound test code instances, and then inline an instance of that module.

In that case, the bind needs to be updated. To support this, the BindTable is pre-populated with already bound instances, and the existing logic to update binds during inlining fixes them up.
